posts.author: ram_perel (Ram Perel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
In board view and widgets you can add settings to the feature.
The problem is that you need to load the create the options hard coded to the feature.
It would be great if we can dynamically create the option while running (especially for dropdown)
Thanks!
